system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_ctphieunhap_insert4","body":"
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_CTPHIEUNHAP_INSERT4]
(	@id_dathang nvarchar(MAX),	@sopn nvarchar(50),	@mavt nvarchar(MAX),	@slnhap decimal(18, 3),	@soluong_du decimal(18, 3),	@ghichu nvarchar(MAX),	@ngaynhap datetime,	@nguoinhap nvarchar(50),	@idchitiet nvarchar(50),	@gianhap money,	@tigia money
)
AS
BEGIN
	IF @slnhap + @soluong_du > 0
	BEGIN
		-- INSERT CHI TIẾT PHIẾU NHẬP
		INSERT INTO tr_ctphieunhap
		(			id_dathang,			sopn,			mavt,			slnhap,			soluong_du,			ghichu,			ngaynhap,			nguoinhap,			idchitiet,			gianhap,			tigia
		)
		VALUES
		(			@id_dathang,			@sopn,			@mavt,			@slnhap,			@soluong_du,			@ghichu,			@ngaynhap,			@nguoinhap,			@idchitiet,			@gianhap,			@tigia
		)

		DECLARE @makho nvarchar(50);
		SET @makho = dbo.ufn_GetWHSMaterial(@mavt);

		-- CẬP NHẬT SỐ LƯỢNG TỒN KHO
		IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tr_tonkho_sum WHERE mavt = @mavt)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE tr_tonkho_sum
			SET soluong = soluong + COALESCE(@slnhap, 0) + COALESCE(@soluong_du, 0)
			WHERE mavt = @mavt
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO tr_tonkho_sum (mavt, makho, soluong) VALUES (@mavt, @makho, COALESCE(@slnhap, 0) + COALESCE(@soluong_du, 0));
		END

		-- CẬP NHẬT SỐ LƯỢNG NHẬN CỦA DƠN HÀNG NẾU @idchitiet != NULL
		IF @idchitiet IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			UPDATE tr_dondathang_chitiet
			SET sl_danhan = COALESCE(sl_danhan, 0) + @slnhap,
				sl_conlai = sl_conlai - @slnhap
			WHERE id = @idchitiet
		END

		-- CẬP NHẬT THÔNG TIN GIAO DỊCH
		INSERT INTO TR_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION (KHO, MAVT, SOLUONG, LOAIGIAODICH, MADONHANG, ID_MAVT, GHICHU, SOPHIEU, DONGIA)
		VALUES (@makho, @mavt, COALESCE(@slnhap, 0) + COALESCE(@soluong_du, 0), N'Nhập kho', @id_dathang, @idchitiet, @ghichu, @sopn, @gianhap);
	END
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_material_transaction","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"flags":["writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
